title: Scratch DB run summary
problem: Ticket-068 persists operator-reviewed live probe metadata to an isolated scratch SQLite DB, but operators must query rows manually to see cross-run evidence. A deterministic read-only summary command is needed over scratch rows without model authority or graph/export coupling.
acceptance_criteria: probe-scratch-summary reads scratch DB read-only and never mutates it.
Empty valid scratch DB returns deterministic empty summary.
Summary includes fixture, floor, stage, contradiction-mode, and rejection counts.
Summary includes safety flags (no graph authority, export, model authority, raw responses).
Deterministic output for same DB state.
No accepted graph or scratch DB writes from summary command.
Golden/mock gates and safety audit pass.
non_goals: No scratch or accepted graph writes.
No public export or site changes.
No ticket authority from summary output.
No raw prompt or model response dumps.
rollback_plan: Revert summary module, CLI, tests, docs, and safety audit extension.
